description: Whether the provider ships default/built-in commands alongside user-defined custom commands.

claude-code.mechanism: extensive set of built-in slash commands (/help, /clear, /compact, /config, /model, /mcp, /memory, /plan, etc.) plus bundled-skill commands (/batch, /debug, /loop); not user-modifiable

cline.mechanism: 6 built-in slash commands: /newtask, /smol (/compact), /newrule, /deep-planning, /explain-changes (VS Code only), /reportbug; hardcoded, not user-modifiable

codex.mechanism: no implementation details captured; slash commands feature exists but format and capabilities are undocumented in cached sources

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI has no standalone slash-command mechanism; extensibility is via plugins that bundle agents/skills/hooks; command format within plugins is undocumented

gemini-cli.mechanism: built-in slash commands include /commands reload (reload command files without restart) and /help; user-defined commands supplement but do not replace built-ins

windsurf.mechanism: no built-in slash commands for Workflows; Windsurf Command (Cmd+I) is a UI keyboard shortcut, not a slash command
